mapper.select: SELECT id, username, role, avatar FROM user_account WHERE id > #{afterId} AND avatar IS NOT NULL AND avatar <> '' ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id, owner_username AS ownerUsername, original_url AS originalUrl, thumb_320_url AS thumb320Url, thumb_720_url AS thumb720Url, thumb_1280_url AS thumb1280Url FROM wallpaper_asset WHERE id > #{afterId} AND ( (original_url IS NOT NULL AND original_url <> '') OR (thumb_320_url IS NOT NULL AND thumb_320_url <> '') OR (thumb_720_url IS NOT NULL AND thumb_720_url <> '') OR (thumb_1280_url IS NOT NULL AND thumb_1280_url <> '') ) ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id, username, feedback_log_url AS feedbackLogUrl, feedback_screenshot_url AS feedbackScreenshotUrl FROM issue_feedback WHERE id > #{afterId} AND ( (feedback_log_url IS NOT NULL AND feedback_log_url <> '') OR (feedback_screenshot_url IS NOT NULL AND feedback_screenshot_url <> '') ) ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
